name: Three Musketeers
author: Haar Hoolim / AGP port
description: Asymmetric hunt on a 5x5 board. The three Musketeers (seat 0) must capture an adjacent enemy on every turn; the 22 Cardinal's men (seat 1) shuffle into empty squares. The enemy wins by herding all three Musketeers into one row or column; the Musketeers win if, on their turn, no capture is available. Musketeers move first.
